extracted_information: Common Ninja's Age Verification widget is a free, customizable, and responsive pop-up tool designed to help websites comply with legal age requirements for restricted content and products. It offers various layouts, validation types, and display rules, with easy no-code embedding and broad platform compatibility.

specifications.widget_type: Age Verification Pop-up / Age Gate Widget
specifications.responsiveness: Fully responsive, looks great on any device
specifications.data_privacy: GDPR compliant, does not collect or store personal data
specifications.technical_requirements: No coding knowledge required for setup; custom CSS option available for advanced users

pricing.details: Free to use with a limit on the number of views; view limit may vary depending on the plan. Option to upgrade to paid version for more advanced features and capabilities or higher view limits. No specific pricing tiers or costs provided.

features: Protects business by complying with legal age requirements for products (e.g., alcohol, tobacco, similar products) and services.
Enhances website design with customizable popups.
Advanced display rules (triggers: on exit, on page scroll, after a certain time delay).
Three validation types: buttons, year input, birthday.
Selection of beautiful icons to enrich visual appearance.
Compliant with General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
Does not collect or store personal data.
customization_options: Fully customizable design: change colors, fonts, spacing.
Select validation type (buttons, year input, birthday).
Customize advanced display rules (when and where to show the widget).
Add a redirect URL for non-compliant ages.
Add custom CSS for advanced design modifications.
implementation_methods: Easy to embed by copying a single line of code.
Seamless integration with any website or platform.

cannabis_hemp_e_commerce.details: Widget is designed to comply with legal age requirements for 'alcohol, tobacco, and other similar products', which directly includes cannabis/hemp e-commerce. It allows posing age restrictions on 'products and services' and helps protect businesses by ensuring compliance with local laws. The generic nature of 'similar products' implies suitability for regulated industries like cannabis/hemp.
